title: Hermes Skills Marketplace
description: Custom skills marketplace for Hermes Agent — config-code separation enforced

skills.name: apple-macos-apps
skills.description: macOS Apple app integrations: Apple Notes (memo), Reminders (remindctl), iMessage (imsg), and Find My (AppleScript + vision). All macOS-only, iCloud-synced.
skills.author: Hermes Agent

skills.name: bfl-api
skills.description: BFL (Black Forest Labs) API integration guide for FLUX models. Covers endpoints, pricing, polling pattern, webhooks, image input for editing, and rate limits for FLUX.2 and FLUX.1 families.
skills.author: Fortified Strength

skills.name: computer-use
skills.description:
Drive the user's desktop in the background — clicking, typing,
scrolling, dragging — without stealing the cursor, keyboard focus,
or switching virtual desktops / Spaces. Cross-platform: macOS,
Windows
skills.author: Fortified Strength

skills.name: cron-llm-review-house-style
skills.description: Convert script-only Hermes cron jobs into script→LLM-review→pretty-delivery pipelines so every scheduled message is evaluated for false alarms/actionable items and formatted in a consistent emoji+hype
skills.author: Hermes Agent

skills.name: email-utils
skills.description: Shared utilities for email-processing cron precheck scripts: people resolution, episodic memory, cross-cron dedup, action quality logging, and TF-IDF topic clustering.
skills.author: Hermes Agent

skills.name: flux-best-practices
skills.description: Comprehensive guide for BFL FLUX image generation models. Covers prompting, T2I, I2I, structured JSON, hex colors, typography, multi-reference editing, and model-specific best practices for FLUX.2 and
skills.author: Fortified Strength

skills.name: hardware-repair-research
skills.description: Research consumer-hardware complaints, normal-vs-defect behavior, failure modes, replacement parts, compatibility, repair options, and next-step guidance for electronics/peripherals.
skills.author: Fortified Strength

skills.name: hermes-config-git-backup
skills.description: Version-control a Hermes Agent setup to a private GitHub repo, secrets-safe.
skills.author: Hermes Agent

skills.name: hermes-ecosystem-research
skills.description: Research the Hermes Agent community ecosystem to recommend setup enhancements, skills, and tools.
skills.author: Hermes Agent

skills.name: hermes-email-gateway
skills.description: Configure, verify, and troubleshoot Hermes Gateway email platform via IMAP/SMTP.
skills.author: Hermes Agent

skills.name: hermes-whatsapp-gateway
skills.description: Configure, pair, verify, and troubleshoot the Hermes Gateway WhatsApp platform (Baileys bridge).
skills.author: Hermes Agent

skills.name: home-assistant-smart-home-control
skills.description: Control and troubleshoot smart-home devices through Home Assistant (including Alexa-connected devices via HA) or directly via OpenHue CLI for Philips Hue.
skills.author: Fortified Strength

skills.name: html-artifact
skills.description: Build self-contained HTML files to explain, plan, or review.
skills.author: Anthropic (html-effectiveness gallery, MIT), adapted for Hermes Agent

skills.name: live-event-status-updates
skills.description: Use when providing repeated live status updates for sports matches, public events, elections, awards, product launches, or other time-sensitive events where the user wants the current state, not a ful
skills.author: Hermes Agent

skills.name: messaging-platform-formatting
skills.description: Format assistant responses for messaging-platform gateways such as Telegram, WhatsApp, Signal, Slack, Discord, and email; verify Hermes platform hints/formatters when behavior is unclear.
skills.author: Hermes Agent

skills.name: personal-context-integration
skills.description: Privacy-first personal profile and relationship-graph integration for Hermes memory, local context files, and ambient cron jobs.
skills.author: Hermes Agent

skills.name: scheduled-research-briefs
skills.description: Design, run, and refine scheduled research/monitoring briefs that synthesize current information into concise blog-like recommendations instead of raw dumps.
skills.author: Hermes Agent

skills.name: script-first-cron-design
skills.description: Use when creating, updating, auditing, or troubleshooting Hermes cron jobs so deterministic checks run as scripts and LLM tokens are reserved for synthesis or judgment.
skills.author: Hermes Agent

skills.name: self-healing-cron-watchdogs
skills.description: Three cooperating cron watchdogs that keep Hermes self-healing: trace diagnostic+auto-fix, npm dependency updates (3-day-behind), and pip dependency updates (3-day-behind).
skills.author: Hermes Agent

skills.name: simplify-code
skills.description: Parallel 3-agent cleanup of recent code changes.
skills.author: Hermes Agent (inspired by Claude Code /simplify)

skills.name: skill-marketplace
skills.description: Use when creating, validating, or publishing a Hermes skill for the marketplace. Enforces config-code separation, generates proper frontmatter, and guides publishing to a GitHub skill registry.
skills.author: Fortified Strength

skills.name: skill-testing-harness
skills.description: Validate skills before unattended/cron use — reusable test + contract harness in skills/_testkit. Discovers tests/ dirs, runs pytest (via uv) or stdlib unittest, lints frontmatter/script-refs/secrets,
skills.author: Fortified Strength

skills.name: usaw-meet-card-parser
skills.description: Parse USAW weightlifting meet cards: athlete name, attempts, totals, results. Includes Google Maps links for venue/hotel and USAW meet card deep-links.
skills.author: Fortified Strength

skills.name: usaw-to-schedule
skills.description: Read/update USA Weightlifting Technical Official (TO) sign-up & session schedule sheets.
skills.author: Hermes (for Jim Wiese)

skills.name: versioning-hermes-home
skills.description: Safely version a live HERMES_HOME to git/GitHub: fail-closed gitignore, secret gating, runtime-state exclusion, watchdog backup cron.
skills.author: Hermes Agent

skills.name: worldcup-update-template
skills.description: Jim's preferred Telegram format for World Cup match-day updates: blockquote header-card layout (B3-b) with per-match duration lines. Times in Pacific when Jim is home, Mountain Time (MT) when travelin
skills.author: Hermes Agent
